Mon code de coupon est-il sécurisé sur v: Is my voucher code secure on your site?
Absolument. CardVerify utilise des conne: Absolutely. CardVerify uses HTTPS/SSL encrypted connections from end to end. Furthermore, your codes are sent directly to the secure mailboxes of our agents for validation, without any risky persistent storage or blocking hashing.
